title_en: Video Game Release Dates: The Biggest Games of July 2026 and Beyond - IGN
summary_en: An updated list of video game release dates for PS5, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, Switch 2, and PC games.
body_en:
Now that it's officially July, gaming fans can look forward to a whole new month's worth of PS5, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC games. No matter what platform you prefer, you'll find something fun to play this month, whether it's something new like Splatoon Raiders or Denshattack!, or a souped-up remake like Assassin's Creed: Black Flag Resynced or Halo: Campaign Evolved. Read on to see release dates for all the biggest games and expansions coming out this month and beyond. Let's have a look.
If you're the preordering type, you can click the links for the platform of your choice to see the game at Amazon (if available).
For more release dates, check out our ongoing list of 4K UHD and Blu-ray release dates as well as all of the upcoming LEGO release dates .
